name: tract_id
description: Foreign key to census_tracts.tract_id; source: Census TIGER/Line

name: nta_code
description: NYC Neighborhood Tabulation Area code; source: NYC Open Data NTA boundaries (Socrata)

name: nta_name
description: Human-readable NTA name (e.g. Jamaica); source: NYC Open Data NTA boundaries (Socrata)

name: overlap_pct
description: Proportion of the census tract area that falls within this NTA; used as weight for NTA-level aggregation; derived in src/equity.py
